accuracy_notes: Intentional spelling variation: Nahuatl paleographic pages use colonial forms (e.g. Moquiuix without accent); Spanish translation pages use modern forms (e.g. Moquíhuix). Do not standardize across sections. Confirmed both-runs-wrong: unoaconejaron → aconsejaron (line-break merge error).
spelling_variation_notes: Moquiuix/Moquíhuix/Moquihuix vary by section — paleographic Nahuatl vs modern Spanish translation. Do not auto-standardize.
